examples.title: Basic Text Generation
examples.description: Simple text generation using the generate_text tool
examples.code: result = await generate_text(model='llama3', prompt='Explain machine learning in simple terms')

expected_output.data: Machine learning is a type of artificial intelligence that allows computers to learn and improve from experience without being explicitly programmed. It works by feeding large amounts of data to algorithms that can identify patterns and make predictions.

examples.title: Chat Completion with Context
examples.description: Multi-turn conversation using chat_completion tool
examples.code: result = await chat_completion(model='llama3', messages=[{'role': 'user', 'content': 'What is the capital of France?'}])

expected_output.data: The capital of France is Paris.

examples.title: Model Health Check
examples.description: Check overall system health using portmanteau health tool
examples.code: result = await llm_health_tool('health_check')

examples.title: List Available Models
examples.description: Discover all available models across providers
examples.code: result = await llm_models_tool('list_models')

examples.title: Text Embedding Generation
examples.description: Generate vector embeddings for text similarity
examples.code: result = await embed_text(text=['Hello world', 'Machine learning'], model='text-embedding-ada-002')

examples.title: Image Analysis
examples.description: Analyze image content using multimodal capabilities
examples.code: result = await llm_multimodal_tool('analyze_image', image='/path/to/photo.jpg')

expected_output.description: A beautiful sunset over mountains with vibrant orange and purple colors in the sky

examples.title: Image Generation
examples.description: Generate images from text descriptions
examples.code: result = await llm_multimodal_tool('generate_image', prompt='A serene lake at dawn with mist rising from the water', width=512, height=512)

examples.title: Model Fine-tuning Setup
examples.description: Prepare a model for LoRA fine-tuning
examples.code: result = await llm_finetuning_tool('lora_prepare', model_name='llama3', lora_rank=8, lora_alpha=16)

examples.title: Ollama Model Management
examples.description: Download and manage models with Ollama portmanteau tool
examples.code:
await llm_ollama_tool('pull_model', model='llama3:8b')
models = await llm_ollama_tool('list_models')
await llm_ollama_tool('load_model', model='llama3:8b')

examples.title: Advanced Text Generation
examples.description: Text generation with advanced parameters
examples.code: result = await llm_generation_tool('generate_text', model='llama3', prompt='Write a Python function', temperature=0.1, max_tokens=300, frequency_penalty=0.3)

examples.title: System Resource Monitoring
examples.description: Monitor system resources during operations
examples.code: result = await llm_health_tool('get_metrics', name='cpu_percent', since_minutes=5)

examples.title: Error Handling Example
examples.description: Proper error handling for failed operations
examples.code: result = await generate_text(model='nonexistent-model', prompt='test')

expected_output.error: Model 'nonexistent-model' not found. Available models: llama3, mistral, phi3
next_steps: Use a valid model name from the list
Try loading the model first if it's not available

examples.title: Batch Text Processing
examples.description: Process multiple texts efficiently
examples.code:
results = []
for prompt in ['Summarize AI', 'Explain quantum', 'Code a function']:
    result = await generate_text(model='llama3', prompt=prompt, max_tokens=100)
    results.append(result['data'])

results: AI is technology that enables machines to perform tasks that typically require human intelligence...
Quantum computing uses quantum mechanics principles like superposition and entanglement...

def greet_user(name):
    return f'Hello, {name}! Welcome to our application.'

examples.title: Model Comparison
examples.description: Compare outputs from different models

comparisons.llama3: Recursion is a programming technique where a function calls itself to solve a problem...
comparisons.mistral: Recursion occurs when a function invokes itself during its execution...

examples.title: Interactive Chat Session
examples.description: Maintain conversation context across multiple turns
examples.code:
messages = [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Help me learn Python'}]
response1 = await chat_completion(model='llama3', messages=messages)
messages.append({'role': 'assistant', 'content': response1['data']})
messages.append({'role': 'user', 'content': 'Show me a loop example'})
response2 = await chat_completion(model='llama3', messages=messages)

conversation.assistant: I'd be happy to help you learn Python! Python is a versatile programming language...

examples.title: Ollama Model Management
examples.description: Download and manage models with Ollama portmanteau tool
examples.code:
await llm_ollama_tool('pull_model', model='llama3:8b')
models = await llm_ollama_tool('list_models')
await llm_ollama_tool('load_model', model='llama3:8b')

examples.title: GPU Memory Management
examples.description: Monitor and optimize NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPU memory
examples.code:
status = await gpu_status()
if status['gpus'][0]['memory_utilization'] > 85:
    await gpu_clear_memory(gpu_id=0)
    optimized = await gpu_optimize(gpu_id=0)
    print(f'Freed {optimized["memory_freed_mb"]:.1f}MB')

examples.title: GPU Health Monitoring
examples.description: Comprehensive GPU health check with recommendations
examples.code:
health = await gpu_health_check(gpu_id=0)
print(f'Health Score: {health["health_score"]}/100')
if health['alerts']:
    print('Alerts:', health['alerts'])

recommendations: GPU status looks good. No immediate action required.

examples.title: Hugging Face Model Management
examples.description: Search and download models from Hugging Face Hub (supports gated models like FLUX)
examples.code:
models = await llm_huggingface_tool('search_models', query='flux')
info = await llm_huggingface_tool('get_model_info', model_id='blackforestlabs/FLUX.1-dev')
download = await llm_huggingface_tool('download_model', model_id='blackforestlabs/FLUX.1-dev', local_path='./models')

examples.title: Google Cloud Gemini Model Usage
examples.description: Use Gemini 3 Flash and other Google Cloud AI models
examples.code:
auth = await llm_google_cloud_tool('authenticate')
models = await llm_google_cloud_tool('list_models')
info = await llm_google_cloud_tool('get_model_info', model_id='gemini-3.0-flash-exp')
generation = await llm_google_cloud_tool('generate_text', model_id='gemini-3.0-flash-exp', prompt='Explain quantum computing')

expected_output.generation: Quantum computing uses quantum mechanics principles like superposition and entanglement to perform computations...

examples.title: Google Cloud Storage Operations
examples.description: Upload and manage models/datasets in Google Cloud Storage
examples.code:
bucket = await llm_google_cloud_tool('create_gcs_bucket', bucket_name='my-ai-models')
upload = await llm_google_cloud_tool('upload_to_gcs', bucket_name='my-ai-models', file_path='./model.bin', destination_path='models/custom-model.bin')
files = await llm_google_cloud_tool('list_gcs_bucket', bucket_name='my-ai-models')

workflows.name: Content Creation Pipeline
workflows.description: Complete workflow for creating and refining content

steps.purpose: Discover suitable models for content creation

steps.code: draft = await generate_text(model='llama3', prompt='Write about sustainable energy', max_tokens=500)
refined = await chat_completion(model='llama3', messages=[{'role': 'user', 'content': f'Improve this draft: {draft["data"]}'}])

error_scenarios.description: Attempting to use an unavailable model
error_scenarios.recovery: Use list_models() to see available options
Unload unused models or use smaller models
Check network connection or try smaller model

tips: Use appropriate model sizes for tasks
Monitor system resources during long operations
Handle errors gracefully with retry logic
Use smaller models for simple tasks
